description: Create a User Story Map for the 'SkyHigh Travel' application in EdrawMax. The diagram must feature three blue Backbone Activities: 'Search Flights', 'Book Flight', and 'Manage Trip'. Populate these activities with yellow user story cards: 'Search by Date' (MVP) and 'Filter by Price' (Release 2) under Search; 'Guest Checkout' (MVP), 'Pay with Credit Card' (MVP), and 'Save Payment Details' (Release 2) under Book; and 'View Itinerary' (MVP), 'Cancel Booking' (Release 2), and 'Share Itinerary' (Release 2) under Manage. Visually organize the stories into 'MVP Release' and 'Release 2' slices using horizontal separation. Save the project as /home/ga/Documents/skyhigh_story_map.eddx and export the final diagram to /home/ga/Documents/skyhigh_story_map.png.
